title: Runloop Snapshot
description: JSON Schema for the Runloop snapshot resource, derived from the Runloop OpenAPI schema DevboxDiskSnapshotView.

id.description: The unique identifier of the snapshot.

name.description: (Optional) The custom name of the snapshot.

create_time_ms.description: Creation time of the Snapshot (Unix timestamp milliseconds).

metadata.description: User defined metadata associated with the snapshot.

source_devbox_id.description: The source Devbox ID this snapshot was created from.

source_blueprint_id.description: (Optional) The source Blueprint ID this snapshot was created from.

commit_message.description: (Optional) The commit message of the snapshot (max 1000 characters).

size_bytes.description: (Optional) The size of the snapshot in bytes, relative to the base blueprint.
